## Meeting purpose

[Discuss AI-powered content generation and go-to-market strategies](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel has seen significant success using AI + human experts to drive content creation and traffic growth (e.g. 24x increase in traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [He has developed a comprehensive approach involving AI workflows, expert oversight, and automation to power content generation and broader go-to-market efforts](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [There is an opportunity to collaborate, with Matteo potentially joining Marcel's agency as a strategist to help manage client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)

## Topics

### Background and Hook

  - [Marcel's experience driving massive growth at companies like ServiceSource, Hushy, and now Deep Ramp using AI-powered strategies](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [The powerful premise: AI won't replace jobs, but people leveraging AI will take others' jobs](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Posing the "what if you had 100 new employees?" thought experiment to highlight need for systematic AI adoption](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### AI-Powered Content Engine

  - [Building a content engine using AI for insight gathering, content creation, optimization](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Specific workflows for inputs, processing, variables, planners, critics, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Achieving huge results in traffic, rankings, subscribers by integrating AI throughout](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

### Broader AI-Led Go-to-Market

  - [Expanding the AI-powered approach beyond just content to all go-to-market motions](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Frameworks for prioritizing AI adoption (e.g. most repetitive, manual creativity tasks)](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Demos of AI workflows across different go-to-market use cases](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Powerful results for Deep Ramp's agency clients adopting this model](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

  - [$9k/month for \~100k words of AI-generated, human-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Leveraging trained offshore teams as "content producers"](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Need for experienced "strategists" to manage multiple client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Potential opportunity for Matteo to join as a strategist](https://fathom.video/share/BaEPBDXqUGQiNofhGesw5yhC_zz3Fksy?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
